---
title: "Lab 7 — Reading Text with an LLM"
---

# Lab 7 — Reading Text with an LLM

**Read first:** Chapters 19–20 (NLP Basics; Reading Text with AI).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_07.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
